description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in smooth, dark brown leather, featuring a sleek and minimalist design. The seat consists of three large, uniform cushions, while the backrest is fitted with three matching back cushions, all appearing loose and plush. Two dark gray throw pillows and a matching gray throw blanket are arranged on the right side, adding a touch of contrast and comfort. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and padded, aligning with the backrest for a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The sofa stands on four slender, exposed metal legs with a dark finish, providing stability and a slightly elevated profile. The overall appearance is clean, sophisticated, and well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or upscale waiting areas.
description: A sleek, dark brown leather three-seater sofa with straight padded armrests, three seat and back cushions, gray accent pillows, and slim metal legs. The design is modern and minimalist, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, two gray pillows, and a gray throw on the right side.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the straight armrest, and the draped gray throw blanket.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth leather back and the sofa's clean lines without visible cushions or pillows.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the straight armrest and the arrangement of cushions and pillows from the opposite side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size, with two smaller gray throw pillows and a gray throw blanket on the right.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, medium-height, padded armrests aligned with the backrest, boxy and minimalist with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, exposed metal legs positioned at the corners, straight and dark-finished, providing an elevated and modern look.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with three loose, uniform back cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown leather with a smooth, untextured finish and no visible stitching or decorative patterns.
